_comment: Multi-level lucky modifier. Each level needs 90 'lapis units' to commit. Sources: lapis lazuli = 1 unit/item, lapis block = 9 units/item. So level 1 = 90 dust OR 10 blocks OR any mix that sums to 90. Each level x1.5: 90, 135, 203, 304... Each level scales BOTH the ore-drop bonus (vanilla Fortune formula) and the mob-drop bonus (Looting-style) and consumes one modifier slot.
